npmPackages.name: @types/vscode
npmPackages.complianceNotes: Re-run compile and extension activation checks when the VS Code API surface advances.

npmPackages.name: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
npmPackages.complianceNotes: Re-run MCP registry and client tests when the SDK changes.

marketplaceExtensions.complianceNotes: Re-check chat participant interoperability, walkthrough links, and extension-recommendation guidance.
Review PR workflow guidance and any automation that assumes the GitHub extension is available.
Review documented workflows that mention GitLens-driven review or repository inspection paths.
Re-check lint instructions and expected workspace recommendations when the extension shifts major behavior.
Low-risk recommendation; keep listed version drift visible for contributor environment consistency.
Review contributor guidance if formatter defaults or activation behavior shift materially.
Check workflow and manifest authoring guidance if YAML validation behavior changes.

providerContracts.displayName: VS Code Copilot language model path
providerContracts.reviewTrigger: When GitHub Copilot or Copilot Chat versions drift, re-check explicit provider activation, model discovery, and permission prompts.
When Azure OpenAI publishes API-contract changes or when the configured API version constant changes, re-check deployment-backed chat routing and auth handling.
When Bedrock model IDs, auth guidance, or Converse request semantics change, re-check signing, model discovery, and configuration docs.

When OpenAI, DeepSeek, Mistral, Google Gemini, xAI, Cohere, Perplexity, Hugging Face, NVIDIA, or z.ai announce chat payload, auth, or model-catalog changes, re-check adapter compatibility assumptions.
When EXA, ElevenLabs, Stability AI, or Runway publish breaking configuration or auth changes, re-check panel guidance and SecretStorage-backed setup flows.
